---
class: left
count: false

.blockquote[Big Picture & Data Strategy]

## Fû¥nf statistische Fundamente ã und ihr Transfer in die Data Science

<style>
.bridge-wrap { margin-top: -0.7em; }
.bridge-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 38px 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 0.13em;
  align-items: stretch;
}
.bridge-left {
  border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 0.70em;
  line-height: 1.33;
  background: #f5f0fa;
  border: 1px solid #c9a8e0;
  border-right: none;
}
.bridge-right {
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 0.70em;
  line-height: 1.33;
  background: #fff0f0;
  border: 1px solid #f0a8a8;
  border-left: none;
}
.bridge-arrow {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: #4a4a4a;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 7.5px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.25;
  padding: 3px 2px;
  writing-mode: vertical-lr;
  text-orientation: mixed;
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}
.bridge-kw-l { color: #502479; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.03em; }
.bridge-kw-r { color: #D50006; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.03em; }
.bridge-chip-l {
  background: rgba(80,36,121,0.12); border-radius: 3px;
  padding: 1px 4px; font-size: 0.87em;
  display: inline-block; margin: 1px;
}
.bridge-chip-r {
  background: rgba(213,0,6,0.12); border-radius: 3px;
  padding: 1px 4px; font-size: 0.87em;
  display: inline-block; margin: 1px;
}
.bridge-hdr {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 38px 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.12em;
}
.bridge-hdr-l {
  background: #502479; color: white; font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 9px;
  border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px; text-align: center;
}
.bridge-hdr-c { background: #4a4a4a; }
.bridge-hdr-r {
  background: #D50006; color: white; font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 9px;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; text-align: center;
}
.bridge-ghost {
  opacity: 0.13;
}
</style>

<div class="bridge-wrap">

<!-- Header -->
<div class="bridge-hdr">
  <div class="bridge-hdr-l">`r fa('chart-line', fill='white')` &nbsp;Klassisches Konzept</div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-c"></div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-r">`r fa('robot', fill='white')` &nbsp;Data Science Transfer</div>
</div>

<!-- 1: AKTIV -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('equals')` E[Y|X] ã Bedingter Erwartungswert</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">OLS</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Regressionslinie</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Populationsmodell</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Regression schûÊtzt den Mittelwert von Y gegeben X</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">MarktôÙbenchôÙmark</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('bullseye')` Residuum als Arbitrage-Chance</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Jedes ML-Modell</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Underperformance</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">e = y ã éñ &nbsp;ã&nbsp; Unter-/ûberbewertung quantifizieren</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 2ã5: ausgegraut -->
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('arrows-rotate')` Stichprobenverteilung</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('shuffle')` Bootstrap ôñ infer</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('scale-balanced')` Erwartungswert &amp; Fehlertypen</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('coins')` Expected Value Framework</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('filter')` p-Wert ôñ öÝ-Niveau ôñ MultiplizitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('triangle-exclamation')` FDR ôñ p-Hacking</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('code-branch')` Korrelation ã  KausalitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('flask')` A/B-Test ôñ Causal ML</span></div>
</div>

</div>

???
* Residuum als Unterperformance-Maû ist der Kern der Carseats-Fallstudie
* E[Y|X]: jedes ML-Modell ã egal wie komplex ã schûÊtzt letztlich diesen Erwartungswert

---
class: left
count: false

.blockquote[Big Picture & Data Strategy]

## Fû¥nf statistische Fundamente ã und ihr Transfer in die Data Science

<div class="bridge-wrap">
<div class="bridge-hdr">
  <div class="bridge-hdr-l">`r fa('chart-line', fill='white')` &nbsp;Klassisches Konzept</div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-c"></div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-r">`r fa('robot', fill='white')` &nbsp;Data Science Transfer</div>
</div>

<!-- 1 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('equals')` E[Y|X] ã Bedingter Erwartungswert</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">OLS</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Regressionslinie</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Populationsmodell</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Regression schûÊtzt den Mittelwert von Y gegeben X</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">MarktôÙbenchôÙmark</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('bullseye')` Residuum als Arbitrage-Chance</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Jedes ML-Modell</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Underperformance</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">e = y ã éñ &nbsp;ã&nbsp; Unter-/ûberbewertung quantifizieren</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 2: AKTIV -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('arrows-rotate')` Stichprobenverteilung</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">Standardfehler</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Konfidenzintervall</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">CLT</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ãWas wenn wir immer wieder neu ziehen wû¥rden?"</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">UnsicherôÙheit messen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('shuffle')` Bootstrap ôñ infer</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Resampling</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">keine Verteilungsannahme</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Rechenpower ersetzt Formel ã fû¥r beliebige Algorithmen</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 3ã5: ausgegraut -->
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('scale-balanced')` Erwartungswert &amp; Fehlertypen</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('coins')` Expected Value Framework</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('filter')` p-Wert ôñ öÝ-Niveau ôñ MultiplizitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('triangle-exclamation')` FDR ôñ p-Hacking</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('code-branch')` Korrelation ã  KausalitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('flask')` A/B-Test ôñ Causal ML</span></div>
</div>
</div>

???
* Bootstrap = "Gedankenexperiment mit Rechenpower" ã gleiche Logik wie CLT, kein Normalverteilungsannahme nûÑtig
* infer-Paket: tidyverse-kompatibel, gleiche Syntax fû¥r Permutationstest und Bootstrap

---
class: left
count: false

.blockquote[Big Picture & Data Strategy]

## Fû¥nf statistische Fundamente ã und ihr Transfer in die Data Science

<div class="bridge-wrap">
<div class="bridge-hdr">
  <div class="bridge-hdr-l">`r fa('chart-line', fill='white')` &nbsp;Klassisches Konzept</div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-c"></div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-r">`r fa('robot', fill='white')` &nbsp;Data Science Transfer</div>
</div>

<!-- 1 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('equals')` E[Y|X] ã Bedingter Erwartungswert</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">OLS</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Regressionslinie</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Populationsmodell</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Regression schûÊtzt den Mittelwert von Y gegeben X</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">MarktôÙbenchôÙmark</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('bullseye')` Residuum als Arbitrage-Chance</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Jedes ML-Modell</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Underperformance</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">e = y ã éñ &nbsp;ã&nbsp; Unter-/ûberbewertung quantifizieren</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 2 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('arrows-rotate')` Stichprobenverteilung</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">Standardfehler</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Konfidenzintervall</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">CLT</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ãWas wenn wir immer wieder neu ziehen wû¥rden?"</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">UnsicherôÙheit messen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('shuffle')` Bootstrap ôñ infer</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Resampling</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">keine Verteilungsannahme</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Rechenpower ersetzt Formel ã fû¥r beliebige Algorithmen</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 3: AKTIV -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('scale-balanced')` Erwartungswert &amp; Fehlertypen</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">E[X] = öÈ pÃçÂôñxÃçÂ</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 1. Art</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 2. Art</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Entscheidungen unter Unsicherheit gewichten</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ROI-Kalkû¥l</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('coins')` Expected Value Framework</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Modellwahrscheinlichkeit</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Kosten/Nutzen</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ã70% Churn-Wahrscheinlichkeit" ã finanzieller ROI?</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 4ã5: ausgegraut -->
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('filter')` p-Wert ôñ öÝ-Niveau ôñ MultiplizitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('triangle-exclamation')` FDR ôñ p-Hacking</span></div>
</div>
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('code-branch')` Korrelation ã  KausalitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('flask')` A/B-Test ôñ Causal ML</span></div>
</div>
</div>

???
* Manager-Relevanz: Modell liefert Wahrscheinlichkeit, Manager entscheidet mit Kosten/Nutzen
* False Positive (Fehler 1. Art) bei Churn-Modell: unnûÑtige Rabattaktion ã Kosten
* False Negative (Fehler 2. Art): Kunde kû¥ndigt unbemerkt ã entgangener Umsatz

---
class: left
count: false

.blockquote[Big Picture & Data Strategy]

## Fû¥nf statistische Fundamente ã und ihr Transfer in die Data Science

<div class="bridge-wrap">
<div class="bridge-hdr">
  <div class="bridge-hdr-l">`r fa('chart-line', fill='white')` &nbsp;Klassisches Konzept</div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-c"></div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-r">`r fa('robot', fill='white')` &nbsp;Data Science Transfer</div>
</div>

<!-- 1 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('equals')` E[Y|X] ã Bedingter Erwartungswert</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">OLS</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Regressionslinie</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Populationsmodell</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Regression schûÊtzt den Mittelwert von Y gegeben X</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">MarktôÙbenchôÙmark</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('bullseye')` Residuum als Arbitrage-Chance</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Jedes ML-Modell</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Underperformance</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">e = y ã éñ &nbsp;ã&nbsp; Unter-/ûberbewertung quantifizieren</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 2 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('arrows-rotate')` Stichprobenverteilung</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">Standardfehler</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Konfidenzintervall</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">CLT</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ãWas wenn wir immer wieder neu ziehen wû¥rden?"</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">UnsicherôÙheit messen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('shuffle')` Bootstrap ôñ infer</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Resampling</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">keine Verteilungsannahme</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Rechenpower ersetzt Formel ã fû¥r beliebige Algorithmen</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 3 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('scale-balanced')` Erwartungswert &amp; Fehlertypen</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">E[X] = öÈ pÃçÂôñxÃçÂ</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 1. Art</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 2. Art</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Entscheidungen unter Unsicherheit gewichten</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ROI-Kalkû¥l</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('coins')` Expected Value Framework</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Modellwahrscheinlichkeit</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Kosten/Nutzen</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ã70% Churn-Wahrscheinlichkeit" ã finanzieller ROI?</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 4: AKTIV -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('filter')` p-Wert ôñ öÝ-Niveau ôñ MultiplizitûÊt</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">öÝ = 0.05</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Hypothesentest</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">1 Test</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Bei einem Test: 5% Fehlerrate akzeptabel</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">Signal vs. Rauschen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('triangle-exclamation')` FDR ôñ p-Hacking</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">1000 Tests ã 50 falsche Treffer</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Benjamini-Hochberg</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">False Discovery Rate kontrolliert Quote falscher Alarme</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 5: ausgegraut -->
<div class="bridge-row bridge-ghost">
  <div class="bridge-left"><span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('code-branch')` Korrelation ã  KausalitûÊt</span></div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ã</div>
  <div class="bridge-right"><span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('flask')` A/B-Test ôñ Causal ML</span></div>
</div>
</div>

???
* p-Hacking: selektives Testen bis p<0.05 ã methodisches Problem in Forschung und Praxis
* Bei 20 Tests mit öÝ=0.05 erwarte ich 1 falschen Treffer per Zufall
* FDR: Benjamini-Hochberg kontrolliert den Anteil falscher Entdeckungen ã nicht einzelne p-Werte

---
class: left
count: false

.blockquote[Big Picture & Data Strategy]

## Fû¥nf statistische Fundamente ã und ihr Transfer in die Data Science

<div class="bridge-wrap">
<div class="bridge-hdr">
  <div class="bridge-hdr-l">`r fa('chart-line', fill='white')` &nbsp;Klassisches Konzept</div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-c"></div>
  <div class="bridge-hdr-r">`r fa('robot', fill='white')` &nbsp;Data Science Transfer</div>
</div>

<!-- 1 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('equals')` E[Y|X] ã Bedingter Erwartungswert</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">OLS</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Regressionslinie</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Populationsmodell</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Regression schûÊtzt den Mittelwert von Y gegeben X</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">MarktôÙbenchôÙmark</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('bullseye')` Residuum als Arbitrage-Chance</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Jedes ML-Modell</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Underperformance</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">e = y ã éñ &nbsp;ã&nbsp; Unter-/ûberbewertung quantifizieren</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 2 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('arrows-rotate')` Stichprobenverteilung</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">Standardfehler</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Konfidenzintervall</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">CLT</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ãWas wenn wir immer wieder neu ziehen wû¥rden?"</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">UnsicherôÙheit messen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('shuffle')` Bootstrap ôñ infer</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Resampling</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">keine Verteilungsannahme</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Rechenpower ersetzt Formel ã fû¥r beliebige Algorithmen</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 3 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('scale-balanced')` Erwartungswert &amp; Fehlertypen</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">E[X] = öÈ pÃçÂôñxÃçÂ</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 1. Art</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Fehler 2. Art</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Entscheidungen unter Unsicherheit gewichten</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">ROI-Kalkû¥l</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('coins')` Expected Value Framework</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">Modellwahrscheinlichkeit</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Kosten/Nutzen</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ã70% Churn-Wahrscheinlichkeit" ã finanzieller ROI?</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 4 -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('filter')` p-Wert ôñ öÝ-Niveau ôñ MultiplizitûÊt</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">öÝ = 0.05</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Hypothesentest</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">1 Test</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Bei einem Test: 5% Fehlerrate akzeptabel</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">Signal vs. Rauschen</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('triangle-exclamation')` FDR ôñ p-Hacking</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">1000 Tests ã 50 falsche Treffer</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Benjamini-Hochberg</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">False Discovery Rate kontrolliert Quote falscher Alarme</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 5: AKTIV -->
<div class="bridge-row">
  <div class="bridge-left">
    <span class="bridge-kw-l">`r fa('code-branch')` Korrelation ã  KausalitûÊt</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-l">Confounder</span><span class="bridge-chip-l">Omitted Variable Bias</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">Dritte Variable kann scheinbaren Zusammenhang erzeugen</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bridge-arrow">IntervenôÙtion</div>
  <div class="bridge-right">
    <span class="bridge-kw-r">`r fa('flask')` A/B-Test ôñ Causal ML</span><br>
    <span class="bridge-chip-r">RCT</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">Conditional Ignorability</span><span class="bridge-chip-r">DAG</span><br>
    <span style="color:#666;">ML versagt bei Interventionen ã KausalitûÊt ist unverzichtbar</span>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

???
* ML prognostiziert gut wenn Zukunft = Vergangenheit ã bei PreisûÊnderung bricht das zusammen
* RCT (A/B-Test): Randomisierung eliminiert Confounder ã Gold-Standard fû¥r Kausalinferenz
* DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph): Pearl's Framework ã welche Variablen mû¥ssen kontrolliert werden?
* Conditional Ignorability: Kausaleffekt identifizierbar wenn alle Confounder beobachtet und kontrolliert
* Alle 5 Konzepte sind in ER014 verankert und werden in ER017/ER018 vorausgesetzt
